g.text: Visual Specifications Canvas • Programmatically Derived & Enhanced via qwen2.5-coder:1.5b
H1 DISPLAY • Sora Bold • 20px / Line-Height: 1.2 • Tracking: Tight
Advisory profiles and SEBI track records.
MONO DATA • JetBrains Mono Bold • 11px / Line-Height: 1.4
Internal 1px white strokes at 6% opacity mask background elements,
providing gorgeous frosted physical refraction when placed over logo
ambient colors. Ensures outstanding readable contrast.
04 // HIGH-FIDELITY ADVISORY STOCK TABLE SPECIFICATION (SEBI COMPLIANT)
Renders inside chat boxes dynamically. Follows strict 2-color stop value laws for green upside / red stop loss numbers.
DESIGN LAW: Numerical Upside values >= 0% must highlight in Success Emerald (#10B981) to emphasize positive forecast bounds.
DESIGN LAW: Stop Loss targets and negative returns are restricted to Protective Rose (#EF4444) swatches to ensure prompt protective visibility.
